_comment: Sword Spirit Beast — Renegade Immortal. A beast formed from accumulated sword intent. Canon: appears near ancient battlefields and sword cultivator ruins.
name: Sword Spirit Beast

canonical.appearance: A vaguely lupine or feline form made entirely of condensed sword energy. Blade-like protrusions along its spine and limbs. Semi-transparent.
canonical.behavior: Aggressive toward anyone carrying weapons. Drawn to sword cultivators' qi. Attacks with blade-like claws.
canonical.habitat: Ancient battlefields, sword cultivator ruins, restriction-imbued areas
canonical.cultivation: Foundation Establishment equivalent (varies with residual sword intent strength)
canonical.diet: Absorbs sword intent from combat, spiritual energy from weapons
canonical.relationships: Sometimes befriended by sword cultivators who share compatible intent. Hostile to all others.
treasures: Sword Essence Crystal (absorbed from defeated beasts, used in weapon refinement)
mutations: Intent Absorption — grows stronger after each combat, temporarily gaining +2 attack damage
canonical.ecology: Scavenger-predator of battlefields. Rare; only forms where immense sword intent has accumulated over centuries.

art_direction.model_notes: Semi-transparent wolf/feline hybrid with blade protrusions. Glowing seams of blue-white energy.
art_direction.texture_notes: Translucent blue-white body. Solid metallic blade spines. Particle trail of sword sparks.
